description: Use this API to return an array of character values for subsystem substation switching devices. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, carray = astaswdevchar(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem substations to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the substation switching device quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: carray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

string.description: Name of the bus to which the nodes are connected (12 characters).
Extended bus name of the bus to which the nodes are connected (18 characters).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of CARRAY, is not large enough.
